name: OwnerRez Vacation Rental API
what_it_does: OwnerRez REST API for owner-operated vacation rental property management platform. Enables AI agents to manage property listings and availability, sync calendars with OTA channels (Airbnb, VRBO, Booking.com), process direct bookings and inquiries, manage guest communications, handle rental agreements and damage protection, and integrate property data with accounting and payment systems.
use_cases: Syncing property availability across OTA channels from calendar management agents
Processing guest inquiries and booking requests from hospitality automation agents
Managing rental agreement delivery and damage protection from guest workflow agents
Retrieving booking and revenue data from property analytics agents
not_for: Professional property management companies with large portfolios (OwnerRez targets individual owners)
Hotel operations without vacation rental direct booking focus
Long-term residential rental without short-term rental OTA channel needs
best_when: An individual vacation rental owner or small operator using OwnerRez wants AI agents to automate guest communication, channel sync, and booking management without manual intervention.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal data from bookings and rental agreements is sensitive. Automated guest messaging must comply with platform terms and applicable regulations.

auth.notes: OwnerRez uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Property-owner scoped credentials. Developer portal for third-party integrations. Partner program for channel and integration partners.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free trial available
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-property pricing; API access included with subscriptions
pricing.notes: US company. Popular with independent owners and small operators. Strong direct booking tools. Competitive pricing vs Guesty and Hostaway for small operators.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in API docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest rental agreement and personal data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2
Designed for independent owners — large-scale automation may be limited
Calendar sync conflicts with OTA channels require careful deduplication
Partner program required for channel integrations — direct API access for own properties
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest rental and personal data. PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency. Owner-operated rental platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest rental agreement and personal data. PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency.
